demographics.living_situation: lives at home; an adult child is present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My heart is hammering completely out of rhythm, I am burning up from the inside, and I cannot stop moving or calm down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over the last two days it has got much worse — the heart racing feels irregular now, she is drenched in sweat and can't sit still, and her adult child is worried she isn't herself this evening.

symptom_narrative.onset: started gradually about three months ago, then got dramatically worse over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: three months, acutely and severely worse for two days
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding and feeling out of rhythm, overheating and burning up from the inside, drenched in sweat, unable to stop moving, extremely restless and on edge
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst she has ever felt — cannot calm down, cannot sit still, feels like something terrible is happening
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the chest for the heart racing, and all over the body for the heat and sweating
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now and worsening over the last two days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — even with the air conditioner turned to maximum she is still overheating
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement or effort; she cannot climb the stairs any more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lost about 8 kg over three months even though she has been eating normally; her arms and legs feel very weak; extremely restless and agitated this evening
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this has ever happened before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing the room, cannot sit still or rest, too weak to climb the stairs, exhausted

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: elderly, lives at home with an adult child who is present and made the call; denies using any stimulant or illicit drugs

objective_data_offered.value: visibly trembling hands, drenched in sweat, pacing and unable to sit still, looks agitated and distressed
adult child says she is extremely restless and agitated and 'not herself' this evening — confused and hard to settle
when the adult child holds her wrist the pulse feels very fast and irregular
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer-felt pulse, not a measured or device reading

objective_data_offered.value: the room is freezing with the air conditioner on maximum and the adult child is wearing a heavy coat, but the patient is still burning up and sweating in light clothing
